CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-01-2011 CONTINUED TO OCT-07-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IBARRA, ANDRES $2,528.60 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,813.10, PER ORDER FILED ON 2/14/12 ((SEE SCANNED DOC)
ARBITRATOR FREEMAN DUVAL CULLOM APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-25-2013 THROUGH MAY-26-2013.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE CHOICE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT IBARRA, ANDRES DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-04-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-17-2011
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION ON FEB-25-2013.
ORDER TO ARBITRATION SENT BY COURT
ORDER TO ARBITRATION OF FEB-25-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-04-2011 CONTINUED TO APR-22-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
